=Hi {{ $json.Name.trim().split(" ")[0] }}, it’s Richard, hope you’ve been keeping well. We spoke previously about financial protection and I just wanted to reconnect.  I’m offering a free, no-obligation review to make sure any cover you have still suits your situation. It’s useful, you can book a quick call at a time that works for you here:
👉 https://calendly.com/richard-fairweather/protection-review

=Hi {{ $json.Name.trim().split(" ")[0] }}, just closing the loop.  I’ll leave this with you — if you ever want a free, no-obligation review, you can book here anytime:
👉 https://calendly.com/richard-fairweather/protection-review

=Hi {{ $json.Name.trim().split(" ")[0] }}, Richard here.  Free protection review — no pressure, just peace of mind. Book anytime here if helpful:

=Hi {{ $json.Name.trim().split(" ")[0] }}, hope you’re well. Just to reassure you — these reviews are completely no obligation and often just provide peace of mind that things are set up properly. If you’d like to book one, here’s the link:
👉 https://calendly.com/richard-fairweather/protection-review

=Hi {{ $json.Name.trim().split(" ")[0] }}, Richard here 👋 Many people I’ve spoken to in the past are surprised how quickly policies can become out of date when life changes. I’m offering a free, no-obligation review just to make sure everything still works as intended. Book anytime here if useful:
👉 https://calendly.com/richard-fairweather/protection-review
